A //fabrik:job handler binds an injectable *jobs.Runner that uses a zero jobs.RuntimeConfig by default.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require (
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.0.0
	github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs v0.0.0
)

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs => JOBSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"
)

//fabrik:provider
func NewJobStore() (jobs.Store, error) { return jobs.NewMemoryStore(), nil }

type Welcome struct{ UserID int64 }

//fabrik:job
func SendWelcome(ctx context.Context, m Welcome) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command
func RunCommand(worker *jobs.Runner) *cli.Command {
	return &cli.Command{Name: "run", Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error { return worker.Run(ctx) }}
}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"errors"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/jobs"

	"app/shared"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	var root *cli.Command
	err := func() error {
		// Providers
		sharedJobsStore, err := shared.NewJobStore()
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}
		jobsManager, err := jobs.New(sharedJobsStore, jobs.Config{})
		if err != nil {
			return err
		}

		// Register
		// Jobs
		if err := jobs.Register[shared.Welcome](jobsManager, "shared.Welcome"); err != nil {
			return err
		}
		if err := jobs.On[shared.Welcome](jobsManager, "SendWelcome", func(c jobs.Context, m shared.Welcome) error {
			return shared.SendWelcome(c, m)
		}); err != nil {
			return err
		}

		root = &cli.Command{
			Name: "app",
			Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
				shared.RunCommand(jobs.NewRunner(jobsManager, jobs.RuntimeConfig{})),
			},
		}
		return nil
	}()
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, context.Canceled) && ctx.Err() != nil {
			return 130
		}
		fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "app:", err)
		return 1
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}
